decision.summary: gv_id remains stored on card_prints and is derived from the one active canonical identity row.

decision_criteria.public_url_stability: Existing public routing already treats card_prints.gv_id as the outward-facing canonical identity.
decision_criteria.downstream_simplicity: Vault, pricing, and catalog flows already anchor to card_prints.
decision_criteria.search_read_simplicity: Read paths remain one-hop for public card resolution.
decision_criteria.migration_safety: Keeping gv_id on card_prints avoids moving the public token to a new table during subsystem introduction.
decision_criteria.active_identity_cardinality: One active canonical identity row per card_print keeps gv_id unambiguous on the parent row.

hard_rules: card_prints owns the public stable gv_id token
future gv_id changes require explicit migration/backfill review
